Document:
# Core Rules Applies during and between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Admins have final say" link="RuleC1"] - [textlink="2. Do not be toxic" link="RuleC2"] - [textlink="3. Do not be intolerant" link="RuleC3"] - [textlink="4. Do not be sexual or shocking" link="RuleC4"] - [textlink="5. Do not share current round info beyond the game" link="RuleC5"] - [textlink="6. Do not discuss or evade bans" link="RuleC6"] - [textlink="7. Only use English" link="RuleC7"] - [textlink="8. Do not exploit or cheat the game" link="RuleC8"] - [textlink="9. Do not share or switch accounts" link="RuleC9"] - [textlink="10. Be at least 16 years old" link="RuleC10"]
